message:
chore: batch sync concurrent agent refinements across tests and provider metadata

Concurrent agents continued refining the test suite and provider
infrastructure after the initial commit series:

Tests:
- e2e_ollama_live.rs: Additional import/assertion refinements
- provider_closure_truth_table.rs: Simplified and deduplicated test cases
- provider_discrepancy_classification.rs: Consolidated classification tests
- validate_e2e_artifact_schema.rs: Extended schema validation coverage
- vcr_redaction_scan.rs: Improved scan pattern matching

Provider infrastructure:
- provider_metadata.rs: Minor metadata field adjustments
- provider-gate-e2e-report.json: Updated gate results with latest test runs

Beads:
- issues.jsonl: Tracker sync with completed work items

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

     },

Structured logging contract verified (correlation IDs, redaction, artifacts). 1 non-defect failure in supporting suite (ollama auth-key assertion)."
